Bash(cd F:/ant-cells-ai-server && for d in \\
  "app/domains/post" \\

  "app/domains/post/application" \\
  "app/domains/post/application/port" \\
  "app/domains/post/application/request" \\
  "app/domains/post/application/response" \\
  "app/domains/post/application/usecase" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter/inbound" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter/inbound/api" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter/outbound" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter/outbound/persistence" \\
  "app/domains/post/infrastructure" \\
  "app/domains/post/infrastructure/orm" \\

done
echo "done")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:33333/youtube/list?page=1" --cookie "user_token=430c28c4-495e-45e4-a849-5588d4a1cdc2" | python -c "import sys,json; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['items']; [print\(i['video_id']\) for i in items[:3]]")

Bash(cd "D:/ai/ant-cells-ai-server" && python -c "
import asyncio, httpx, os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
import aiomysql

load_dotenv\(\)

async def main\(\):
    conn = await aiomysql.connect\(
        host=os.getenv\('MYSQL_HOST'\),
        port=int\(os.getenv\('MYSQL_PORT', 3306\)\),
        user=os.getenv\('MYSQL_USER'\),
        password=os.getenv\('MYSQL_PASSWORD'\),
        db=os.getenv\('MYSQL_DATABASE'\),
    \)
    async with conn.cursor\(\) as cur:
        await cur.execute\('SELECT video_id FROM saved_videos'\)
        rows = await cur.fetchall\(\)
    conn.close\(\)
    video_ids = [r[0] for r in rows]
    print\(f'총 {len\(video_ids\)}개 영상'\)

    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=60\) as client:
        for vid in video_ids:
            try:
                r = await client.post\(f'http://localhost:33333/youtube/comments/save?video_id={vid}&max_count=200'\)
                data = r.json\(\)
                print\(f'{vid}: saved={data.get\(\\"saved_count\\", \\"?\\"\)}'\)
            except Exception as e:
                print\(f'{vid}: ERROR {e}'\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
")
